urdu transliteration text:
Mujh ko Tanha...
Introductory Note:
english translation text: Poet conceptualizes what Fatema-e-Sughra (sa) may have said to her father Imam Hussain (as) as he departed, leaving her back in Madina.

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko mehmil me bhale tum na bithaana Baba
english translation text: You do not need to seat me under the shaded canopy

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Gar khataa mujhse huwi hai to khataa maaf karo
english translation text: If it is such that I have erred, then pardon my error

urdu transliteration text: Maardaale na mujhe aapka jaana Baba
english translation text: For it could be that (the grief of) your leaving will cause me to die

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Dekh tayyaar Sakina hai Ali Akber bhi
english translation text: Look, Sakina and Ali Akber are ready to go with you

urdu transliteration text: Hun agar ghair to tum itna bataana Baba
english translation text: If I am a stranger to you, then please let me know

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Tum se shikwa na karungi apni bimaari ka
english translation text: Never again shall I complain to you of my illness

urdu transliteration text: Khud hi le lungi dawa tum na pilaana Baba
english translation text: I shall have my medicine by myself, you don't need to make me take it

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Saath Asgher ko liye jaane ka maqsad kya hai
english translation text: What's the reason of taking Ashger with you

urdu transliteration text: Apni bimaar se tum ye na chupaana Baba
english translation text: Don't hide the reason from your unwell daughter

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Baba pardes mein Akber ki karo jab shaadi
english translation text: Father! When Akber weds in a faraway land

Us ghari Sughra (A.S.) ko tum bhool na jaana Baba
Then at that joyous moment, do not forget your Sughra

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Phir agar mil na saki itni guzaarish hai meri
english translation text: If we don't meet again then I have one request

urdu transliteration text:
Meri turbat pe diya aake jalaana Baba
Please light candles on my grave
Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone

urdu transliteration text: Kaarwaan jab ye chala karbobala ay "Yaawar“
english translation text: Finally when the caravan was leaving for Karbobala

urdu transliteration text:
Sughra kehti thi yehi lot ke Aana Baba
Sughra kept saying, please do return oh my father
Mujhko tanha na kabhi chorke jaana Baba
english translation text: Father! Leave me not alone
